What We Do

OUR SERVICES

From a single driveway to a full commercial complex — we handle it all with precision, care, and elite results.

🏠
Soft Washing

Our signature low-pressure method safely removes algae, mold, mildew, and bacteria from delicate surfaces without causing damage.

  • Roofs & Shingles
  • Siding & Stucco
  • Painted Surfaces
  • Wood Fences
💦
Pressure Washing

High-powered precision cleaning for tough surfaces. Blasts away years of grime, oil stains, and built-up dirt in a single pass.

  • Driveways & Concrete
  • Patios & Walkways
  • Decks & Fences
  • Retaining Walls
🏢
Commercial Washing

Maintain your business image and property value with our commercial-grade cleaning programs tailored to your schedule.

  • Storefronts & Awnings
  • Parking Lots
  • Fleet Washing
  • Graffiti Removal
🪟
Window Cleaning

Crystal-clear results using streak-free solutions and professional technique for both interior and exterior glass surfaces.

  • Residential Windows
  • Commercial Glass
  • Skylights
  • Solar Panels
🌿
Algae & Mold Treatment

Targeted biocide treatments that kill and prevent regrowth of algae, mold, and mildew for long-lasting protection.

  • Roof Algae Removal
  • Black Streak Treatment
  • Preventive Sealants
  • Annual Programs
🎯
Gutter Cleaning

Prevent water damage and foundation issues with thorough gutter clearing and downspout flushing services.

  • Debris Removal
  • Downspout Flush
  • Gutter Brightening
  • Seasonal Service

Interactive Experience

PRESSURE WASH SIMULATOR

See what lives on your surfaces — and watch our soft wash system eliminate it. Click and drag to clean!

100%
Contamination
0%
Clean Surface
0
Germs Killed
🦠
Algae (Green) — Thrives in moisture and shade. Makes surfaces slippery and etches into concrete over time.
🍄
Mold (Dark) — Produces spores that can enter your home and cause respiratory issues. Spreads rapidly.
🟤
Dirt & Grime — Traps moisture against surfaces, accelerating decay and reducing property value.
⚠️
Bacteria — Outdoor surfaces can harbor E. coli, Salmonella, and other harmful pathogens.
💧
Our eco-safe cleaning agents kill 99.9% of surface bacteria while protecting your landscaping.

📝 SIGN YOUR CONTRACT

You're one step away from locking in elite pricing for your property. Fill in your details and a team member will contact you within 24 hours to finalize your agreement.

Service Agreement Overview

This Maintenance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between Smithen Elite Soft Washing LLC ("Provider") and the undersigned customer ("Client"). Provider agrees to deliver exterior cleaning services as selected by the Client at contracted pricing for the agreed term.

Term & Renewal

Minimum contract term is 2 (two) years. Maximum term is 5 (five) years. Contracts automatically renew for successive 5-year periods unless the Client provides written cancellation notice at least 60 days prior to the renewal date. Client will receive a renewal reminder 90 days before any auto-renewal.

Pricing & Discounts

Contracted pricing is locked in at the discount rate agreed upon at signing (up to 40% off standard rates depending on term length). Provider reserves the right to apply a cost-of-living adjustment not exceeding 3% annually after Year 2.

Early Cancellation Fee

If Client cancels this Agreement before the end of the agreed term, an Early Cancellation Fee will apply equal to 25% of the remaining contracted service value, with a minimum fee of $150. The Provider will issue a written invoice for such fee within 14 days of cancellation notice.

Service Scheduling

Contracted clients receive priority scheduling. Provider will make reasonable efforts to complete services within 5 business days of the Client's requested date. Services may be rescheduled due to weather, safety conditions, or force majeure events at no penalty to either party.

Missed Services

If a scheduled service visit is missed due to Provider fault, the service will be rescheduled at no charge. If Client fails to provide reasonable access on a scheduled date without 24 hours' notice, a $50 trip fee may apply.

Damage & Liability

Provider carries full general liability insurance. Client must disclose any known fragile surfaces, pre-existing damage, or special conditions prior to service. Provider is not liable for pre-existing conditions not disclosed.

Governing Law

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the state in which services are rendered. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration before resorting to litigation.
Your information is secure. A representative will contact you within 24 hours to finalize terms.

⚖️ Important Contract Terms & Disclaimers
  • Minimum contract term is 2 (two) years. Maximum is 5 (five) years.
  • Contracts automatically renew for 5-year periods unless cancelled in writing at least 60 days before renewal date.
  • Early cancellation results in a fee equal to 25% of the remaining contract value (minimum $150).
  • Price lock applies to service rates only. New services added mid-contract are billed at current standard rates unless a contract amendment is signed.
  • Annual cost-of-living adjustments not exceeding 3% may apply after Year 2.
  • Missed or rescheduled visits due to weather or force majeure events do not constitute cancellation or breach.
  • Contract is binding upon written acceptance by both parties. Electronic agreement constitutes written acceptance.
  • All estimates shown are illustrative based on standard service pricing. Final pricing confirmed at signing.
  • Smithen Elite Soft Washing LLC reserves the right to modify contract terms for new agreements. Existing contracts honored until expiration.
